login.metaDescription: Sign in to HackTheTrack to sync your telemetry, garage and notes across devices.
login.heading: Sign in

register.metaDescription: Create a HackTheTrack account to sync your telemetry, garage and notes across devices.
register.heading: Create account
register.ageConfirm: I confirm I am 16 or older, and I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
register.disposableEmail: Please use a permanent email address
register.disposableEmailDesc: Disposable / temporary mailboxes are not allowed.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.confirmAgeRequired: Please confirm you are 16 or older
register.accountCreatedConfirm: Check your email to confirm your account.
register.accountCreatedCheckout: Confirm your email, then sign in to finish checkout for your plan.

reset.metaDescription: Set a new password for your HackTheTrack account.
reset.heading: Set New Password
reset.recoveryOnlyNote: This page only works when opened from the password-reset link in your email. Request a reset from the sign-in page, then follow the emailed link.
reset.recoveryRequiredDesc: Open the reset link from your email to set a new password.
reset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
